title: TechnologyInterface
description: Point of access where technology services are made available to consuming components, per ArchiMate 3.2 TechnologyInterface. Represents the contractual boundary of a technology service — specifying the communication protocol and interaction semantics through which infrastructure capabilities are consumed. A TechnologyInterface anchors the technical coupling point between service provider and consumer within the technology layer.

protocol.description: Communication protocol exposed at this interface, per ArchiMate 3.2 TechnologyInterface element.
